creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Please try a patch proposed in PR https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=222617. Also, you may find usable another fix from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220076 if you use netgraph interfaces ng_iface(4) named like ngXXX.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 222617 ***
